title: Empowering the Next Generation of Data Professionals
paragraphs: The National Students Data Corps (NSDC) Institutional Chapter at the Government Model Engineering College is dedicated to enhancing students' career prospects by providing essential data-related skills.

Established in November 2023, our primary objective is to bridge the gap between the academic curriculum and the evolving demands of the industry, ensuring our students are well-prepared to excel in data-centric careers.
We foster a collaborative environment where students can learn and grow. Through workshops, projects, and mentorship, we turn ideas into impactful solutions.
